message:
doc(controller): clarify mixed-flag-form subheading in coordination cheatsheet

Fresh-eyes pass: the "State inspection" subheading in
defaultControllerPrompt said "pass SESSION as the flag value", which is
only true for some of the listed commands. The block actually mixes
three forms:

- --robot-snapshot and --robot-status are boolean switches (no session)
- --robot-activity and --robot-tail take SESSION as the flag value
- --robot-attention uses a separate --attention-session= companion flag
- ntm mail inbox is a subcommand with SESSION as a positional argument

A controller agent reading the old subheading literally would try to
paste ={{.Session}} onto commands that don't take it and see a flag
error. Replace the qualifier with "note the flag forms vary" so the
agent relies on the per-line examples (which are correct) instead of
the subheading.

Also tighten a couple of trailing phrasings ("for this session",
"drives monitor loop") so each bullet is readable on its own.

No behavior change — pure prompt doc fix.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -54,12 +54,12 @@ Key responsibilities:
 
 Available coordination commands (prefer --robot-* for structured state; avoid interactive TUIs):
 
-State inspection (read-only, safe to call in a loop; pass SESSION as the flag value):
+State inspection (read-only, safe to call in a loop; note the flag forms vary):
 - ntm --robot-snapshot                                     - JSON snapshot of all sessions, agents, work, and health
 - ntm --robot-status                                       - Tmux sessions, panes, and agent states (start here)
-- ntm --robot-activity={{.Session}}                        - Per-agent activity states (idle/busy/error)
+- ntm --robot-activity={{.Session}}                        - Per-agent activity states (idle/busy/error) for this session
 - ntm --robot-tail={{.Session}} --panes=N --lines=50       - Capture recent output from pane N
-- ntm --robot-attention --attention-session={{.Session}}   - Block until an agent needs attention (monitor loop)
+- ntm --robot-attention --attention-session={{.Session}}   - Block until an agent needs attention (drives monitor loop)
 - ntm mail inbox {{.Session}} --json                       - Check Agent Mail inbox for pending messages
 
 Actions (mutating; use deliberately):
